introSection: The Quest is a steel roller coaster from Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at Emerald Park in Ashbourne, County Meath, Ireland. The ride is intertwined with a Suspended Thrill Coaster named Fianna Force, which opened on the same day.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Following a legal battle, the park received planning permission to build this coaster in March 2021.

The ride opened on 22 May 2024.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * The Quest on the park's website

fullText:
The Quest is a steel roller coaster from Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at Emerald Park in Ashbourne, County Meath, Ireland. The ride is intertwined with a Suspended Thrill Coaster named Fianna Force, which opened on the same day.

Following a legal battle, the park received planning permission to build this coaster in March 2021.

The ride opened on 22 May 2024.


 * The Quest on the park's website
